# Proof-before-claim ad

## When to use

Use for skeptical buyers.

## Why it works

Demonstration beats assertion.

## Mechanism

The ad asks for inspection, not belief.

## Required inputs

Short demo, real workflow, low-risk CTA.

## When not to use

If product cannot show value quickly.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

Video completion, demo clicks, sample uploads.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
